Deployment

Multi-Platform Runtime Architecture

Deployment Overview

Ifá-Lang supports multiple deployment targets through a unified codebase with platform-specific optimizations. The three-tier runtime architecture adapts to different environments while maintaining language consistency.

Native (ifa-cli)

Full-featured runtime with complete 16 Odù domains, JIT compilation, and development tools.

  • Complete standard library
  • Maximum performance
  • Full development tools
  • Multi-threading support
Learn More

WebAssembly (ifa-wasm)

Browser runtime with core domains and WebGPU support for web applications.

  • Core 8 domains
  • Browser sandboxing
  • WebGPU graphics
  • Async/await support
Learn More

Embedded (ifa-embedded)

no_std runtime for microcontrollers with memory constraints and hardware integration.

  • Minimal 5 domains
  • Bounded memory
  • GPIO support
  • Real-time constraints
Learn More

Sandbox (ifa-sandbox)

Capability-based WASM sandbox for safe execution of untrusted code.

  • Safe 5 domains
  • Resource limits
  • Capability control
  • Time boxing
Learn More

Quick Start

Choose Your Platform

Desktop Applications

Use the native runtime for maximum features and performance.

# Install native runtime
curl -sSL https://install.ifa-lang.org | sh

# Run your code
ifa run program.ifa

Web Applications

Deploy to browsers using WebAssembly for cross-platform compatibility.

# Build for WebAssembly
cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --package ifa-wasm

# Use in web page
import { run_ifa_code } from './ifa-wasm.js';

IoT Devices

Deploy to embedded systems with minimal memory footprint.

# Build for embedded target
cargo build --target thumbv7m-none-eabi --package ifa-embedded

# Flash to device
openocd -f interface.cfg -f target.cfg

Platform Comparison

Feature Native WebAssembly Embedded Sandbox
Performance Maximum High Low Medium
Memory Unlimited Limited Very Limited Limited
16 Odù Domains Full (16) Core (8) Minimal (5) Safe (5)
File System Full Browser API None None
Networking Full Browser API Limited None
GPU/Graphics Full WebGPU None None
Security OS-level Browser sandbox Hardware isolation Capability-based

Feature Matrix

Domain Availability

Domain Native WASM Embedded Sandbox Purpose
Ogbe ✅ ✅ ✅ ✅ System operations
Irosu ✅ ✅ ✅ ✅ Console I/O
Obara ✅ ✅ ✅ ✅ Math (add/mul)
Oturupon ✅ ✅ ❌ ❌ Math (sub/div)
Ika ✅ ✅ ❌ ✅ String operations
Ogunda ✅ ✅ ❌ ✅ Array operations
Owọn ✅ ✅ ✅ ❌ Random numbers
Odi ✅ ❌ ❌ ❌ File/Database
Otura ✅ ✅ ❌ ❌ Networking
Irete ✅ ❌ ❌ ❌ Crypto/Compression
Ose ✅ ✅ ❌ ❌ Graphics
Ofun ✅ ❌ ❌ ❌ Permissions

Build Configuration

Cargo Features

Feature Selection 
# Full native build
cargo build --features native,full-domains

# WebAssembly build
cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm,core-domains

# Embedded build
cargo build --target thumbv7m-none-eabi --features embedded,core-domains

# Sandbox build
cargo build --features sandbox,safe-domains

Feature Groups

Platform Features

  • native: Full desktop/server features
  • wasm: Browser/WebAssembly features
  • embedded: no_std embedded features
  • sandbox: Capability-based sandbox

Domain Groups

  • full-domains: All 16 Odù domains
  • core-domains: Essential 8 domains
  • safe-domains: Sandbox-safe 5 domains
  • minimal-domains: Embedded 5 domains

Infrastructure

  • backend: Server-side features
  • frontend: Web UI features
  • game: Game development
  • ml: Machine learning
  • iot: IoT device support

Development Workflow

Local Development

Development Setup 
# Clone repository
git clone https://github.com/ifa-lang/ifa-lang
cd ifa-lang

# Install development tools
cargo install --path ifa-cli
cargo install --path ifa-babalawo

# Run locally
ifa run examples/hello.ifa

# Start REPL
ifa repl

# Start LSP server
ifa-babalawo

Testing Across Platforms

Multi-Platform Testing 
# Test all platforms
cargo test --features native,full-domains
cargo test --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --features wasm,core-domains
cargo test --target thumbv7m-none-eabi --features embedded,core-domains

# Integration tests
cargo test --test integration --features native,full-domains

# Performance benchmarks
cargo bench --features native,full-domains

CI/CD Pipeline

  • Automated Builds: Build for all targets on every push
  • Automated Testing: Run tests across all platforms
  • Performance Testing: Benchmark each target
  • Deployment: Automatic deployment to package registries

Documentation

Tools

  • ifa-babalawo: Language server for IDEs

  • ifa-playground: Web-based playground
